prediction.reason: Mercedes has established itself as the dominant force in the new 2026 regulation era, securing a 1-2 finish at the season opener in Australia. George Russell appears to be the form driver, while rookie Andrea Kimi Antonelli has immediately adapted to the competitive W17. Ferrari remains the closest challenger with Charles Leclerc, as Red Bull and McLaren continue to struggle with car balance and power unit integration issues early in the season.
